MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-14-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MARC SEIDENFELD FOR PLAINTIFF ALTHEDA K CARRIE
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY IRENE HOLMES FOR DEFENDANT YUSUF ALI AL IRSHAD

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR POSSESSION OF 2144 SUTTER STREET,#4 AND THE SUM OF $19,015.00.
WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY WITH A STAY UNTIL 10/24/06. NO FURTER STAYS.
DEFENDANT TO LEAVE PREMISES VACANT AND IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. ANY PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND IS DEEMED ABANDONED.
LEASE IS FORFEITED; RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS; EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS. RELEASE PER 1542 CIVIL CODE. NO SECURITY DEPOSIT BEING HELD. DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $1000. BY NOON WEDNESDAY, 9/20/06 BY CASH OR CERTIFIED FUNDS TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY AT 24 LINDEN AVE, So SF.
IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO FOLLOW TERMS OF STIPULATION, STAY MAY BE LIFTED, WITH 24 HOUR NOTICE.
ALL PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

JUDGE PRO TEM:MARTE BASSI ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: RITA HOWELL (218)
